subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, He alone, and blessings rest upon Him after Whom there shall be no Prophet. O my God and my Lord! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله وحده و الصلوه علی من لا نبی بعده یا الهی و سیدی اسئلک باسمک الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
